violations.text: The grout by the three bay sink is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025
Spoon observed in the back hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

The entrance door to the outside is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023
